name: Chief's War Horn
description: Notes Part of the Agents of Oryx Abilities.
effects: Party Effect: Within 5 squares Inspired for 5 seconds. Deafening Blast: Apply Slowed for 4 seconds to enemies within 4 squares. Blast Cooldown: 10 seconds On Use: Place down a banner for 5 seconds that applies Berserk to allies within 4 squares.
